_comment: Verify fixture for the merge Run Code node (the loop body's sink) — the `inputs` dict passed to main(). trainingData/pool are manifest rows ({id,image_path,label}); batch is select_confident's two kept pseudo-labels (ids are a subset of pool). merge grows the labelled set by the batch and removes those ids from the pool, so verifying doubles as a correctness check: trainingDataNext has 4 rows (pool-0481 stamped label 3, pool-1207 stamped label 7), poolNext == [pool-3050], new_confident == 2, and metrics passes through {accuracy:0.399} (a REAL round-2 held-out accuracy from scripts/run_loop_local.py).
